disclosure: Response-time and close-rate figures reflect widely cited lead response management research and are presented as general industry benchmarks, not Black Arrow's proprietary data.

claims.text: Only 17% of service businesses respond to a new lead within an hour, according to industry research.
Responding within 5 minutes roughly doubles close rate compared to slower response times, per industry studies.
The 5-gate customer journey map (click, response, booking, show-up, return) as a diagnostic framework

claims.resolution: Removed the invented dollar valuation. Reframed as a free, no-signup tool that quantifies revenue per lead and the cost of slow follow-up, which the tool itself demonstrates on use.
